title: asperula oligantha var. conferta-elongata
intro: Asperula oligantha var. conferta-elongata, also known as a variety of woodruff, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant contains compounds such as salicylic acid, which is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to aid in relieving symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Asperula oligantha var. conferta-elongata is often used as a tea or tincture to promote relaxation, reduce pain and inflammation, and support overall health and well-being.
